title: ResponderProfile
description: Schema for a responder profile used by the Breakpoints Mux system.

domains.description: High-level routing domains for the responder.

tags.description: Keywords, technologies, and specialties used for matching.

availability.description: Whether the responder is currently available for questions.

responseTimeSla.description: Maximum expected response time in milliseconds.

publicKeyFingerprint.description: Optional fingerprint for provenance-aware responder flows.
